meaning: n.猫头鹰的叫声,汽车喇叭声,表不满或轻蔑的叫嚣,嘲骂声,鸣响vi.大声叫嚣,鸣响,猫头鹰叫vt.呵斥,轰赶
examples: You ought to meet her—she's a hoot!
Why did he hoot at me?
A hoot owl's mournful cry floated out of the encroaching darkness and Fannie tightened her grip on her mother's hand.
Some patrons snuck glances at the screen while others let out the odd hoot of support.
Narcissists could give a hoot less about what anyone else thinks, feels, or wants.
